title: Implement compact and wide TUI layout toggle
description: Add the `L` layout toggle binding and apply compact versus wide layout behavior through screen classes and focus management so the detail panel hides in compact mode and the tree/log layout reflows correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Pressing `L` toggles between wide and compact layout modes.
Wide mode shows the three-column arrangement with the detail panel visible.
Compact mode hides the detail panel and reflows the main area into stacked tree and scheduler log regions.
If focus was on the detail panel when switching to compact mode, focus moves to the list/tree panel.
Switching layouts preserves the current bead selection and does not reset the user's working context.
